=== "sum_hom_units_eq_zero" "Mathlib" "Data/Fintype/BigOperators" (20 matches) ===

• sum_hom_units_eq_zero [theorem]
  (f : G →* R) (hf : f ≠ 1) : ∑ g : G, f g = 0

• sum_hom_units [theorem]
  (f : G →* R) [Decidable (f = 1)] : ∑ g : G, f g = if f = 1 then Fintype.card G else 0

• Finset.sum_eq_zero_iff [theorem]
  ∀ {ι : Type u_1} {M : Type u_4} {s : Finset ι} [inst : AddCommMonoid M] {f : ι → M} [Subsingleton (AddUnits M)],
  ∑ i ∈ s, f i = 0 ↔ ∀ i ∈ s, f i = 0

• FiniteField.sum_subgroup_units_eq_zero [theorem]
  [Ring K] [NoZeroDivisors K] {G : Subgroup Kˣ} [Fintype G] (hg : G ≠ ⊥) : ∑ x : G, (x.val : K) = 0

• Finset.sum_eq_zero [theorem]
  ∀ {ι : Type u_1} {M : Type u_4} {s : Finset ι} [inst : AddCommMonoid M] {f : ι → M},
  (∀ x ∈ s, f x = 0) → ∑ x ∈ s, f x = 0

• Fintype.sum_eq_zero [theorem]
  ∀ {α : Type u_1} {M : Type u_4} [inst : Fintype α] [inst_1 : AddCommMonoid M] (f : α → M),
  (∀ (a : α), f a = 0) → ∑ a, f a = 0

• DFinsupp.sumAddHom_zero [theorem]
  [∀ i, AddZeroClass (β i)] [AddCommMonoid γ] : (sumAddHom fun i => (0 : β i →+ γ)) = 0

• FiniteField.sum_subgroup_units [theorem]
  [Ring K] [NoZeroDivisors K] {G : Subgroup Kˣ} [Fintype G] [Decidable (G = ⊥)] :
  ∑ x : G, (x.val : K) = if G = ⊥ then 1 else 0

• finsum_mem_eq_zero_of_forall_eq_zero [theorem]
  ∀ {α : Type u_1} {M : Type u_5} [inst : AddCommMonoid M] {f : α → M} {s : Set α},
  (∀ x ∈ s, f x = 0) → ∑ᶠ (i : α) (_ : i ∈ s), f i = 0

• finsum_mem_of_eqOn_zero [theorem]
  ∀ {α : Type u_1} {M : Type u_5} [inst : AddCommMonoid M] {f : α → M} {s : Set α},
  Set.EqOn f 0 s → ∑ᶠ (i : α) (_ : i ∈ s), f i = 0

• finsum_eq_zero_of_forall_eq_zero [theorem]
  ∀ {α : Type u_1} {M : Type u_5} [inst : AddCommMonoid M] {f : α → M}, (∀ (x : α), f x = 0) → ∑ᶠ (i : α), f i = 0

• FreeGroup.sum.map_one [theorem]
  : sum (1 : FreeGroup α) = 0

• IsAddUnit.sum_univ_iff [theorem]
  ∀ {ι : Type u_1} {M : Type u_4} [inst : Fintype ι] [inst_1 : AddCommMonoid M] {f : ι → M},
  IsAddUnit (∑ a, f a) ↔ ∀ (a : ι), IsAddUnit (f a)

• IsAddUnit.sum_iff [theorem]
  ∀ {ι : Type u_1} {M : Type u_4} {s : Finset ι} [inst : AddCommMonoid M] {f : ι → M},
  IsAddUnit (∑ a ∈ s, f a) ↔ ∀ a ∈ s, IsAddUnit (f a)

• finsum_mem_zero [theorem]
  ∀ {α : Type u_1} {M : Type u_5} [inst : AddCommMonoid M] (s : Set α), ∑ᶠ (i : α) (_ : i ∈ s), 0 = 0

• AddMonoidHom.coe_finsuppSum [theorem]
  ∀ {α : Type u_1} {β : Type u_7} {N : Type u_10} {P : Type u_11} [inst : Zero β] [inst_1 : AddZeroClass N]
  [inst_2 : AddCommMonoid P] (f : α →₀ β) (g : α → β → N →+ P), ⇑(f.sum g) = f.sum fun i fi => ⇑(g i fi)

• finsum_zero [theorem]
  ∀ {M : Type u_2} {α : Sort u_4} [inst : AddCommMonoid M], ∑ᶠ (x : α), 0 = 0

• Multiset.sum_hom_ne_zero [theorem]
  ∀ {M : Type u_5} {N : Type u_6} [inst : AddCommMonoid M] [inst_1 : AddCommMonoid N] {s : Multiset M},
  s ≠ 0 → ∀ {F : Type u_8} [inst_2 : FunLike F M N] [AddHomClass F M N] (f : F), (Multiset.map (⇑f) s).sum = f s.sum

• Finset.sum_const_zero [theorem]
  ∀ {ι : Type u_1} {M : Type u_3} {s : Finset ι} [inst : AddCommMonoid M], ∑ _x ∈ s, 0 = 0

• Finsupp.sum_zero_index [theorem]
  ∀ {α : Type u_1} {M : Type u_8} {N : Type u_10} [inst : Zero M] [inst_1 : AddCommMonoid N] {h : α → M → N},
  Finsupp.sum 0 h = 0
